title: asterocephalus rigida
intro: Asterocephalus rigida, also known as the brittle aster or brittle plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Compositae. It is native to certain regions in North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Asterocephalus rigida include the ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil for various uses.
